ogTitle: Burrar Islet vs Burrum Heads: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burrar Islet and Burrum Heads.
heading: Burrar Islet vs Burrum Heads — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burrar Islet, Queensland and Burrum Heads, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burrar Islet has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Burrum Heads (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burrar Islet or Burrum Heads safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burrar Islet has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Burrum Heads scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burrar Islet scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Burrum Heads scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burrar Islet or Burrum Heads?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burrar Islet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
